segments.text: I love the Lord, because he has heard my voice and my pleas for mercy.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Because he inclined his ear to me, I will call on him as long as I live.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: as long as I live: Heb. in my days

segments.text: The snares of death encompassed me; the pangs of Sheol laid hold on me; I suffered distress and anguish.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

footnotes: gat hold on me: Heb. found me

segments.text: Then I called on the name of the Lord: 'O Lord, I pray, deliver my soul!'
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Gracious is the Lord, and righteous; our God is merciful.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The Lord preserves the simple; when I was brought low, he saved me.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Return, O my soul, to your rest; for the Lord has dealt bountifully with you.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For you have delivered my soul from death, my eyes from tears, my feet from stumbling.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will walk before the Lord in the land of the living.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I believed, even when I spoke: 'I am greatly afflicted'.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I said in my alarm, 'All mankind are liars'.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: What shall I render to the Lord for all his benefits to me?
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will lift up the cup of salvation and call on the name of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will pay my vows to the Lord in the presence of all his people.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Precious in the sight of the Lord is the death of his saints.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: O Lord, I am your servant; I am your servant, the son of your maidservant. You have loosed my bonds.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will offer to you the sacrifice of thanksgiving and call on the name of the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will pay my vows to the Lord in the presence of all his people,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: in the courts of the house of the Lord, in your midst, O Jerusalem. Praise the Lord!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
